meaning: adj.有破坏性的,损害的,诽谤的
examples: Lead is potentially damaging to children's health.
It is not possible to reposition the rug without damaging it.
The broadscale cutting down of trees is damaging the environment.
The cross-party report warned the proposed changes were being rushed and risked damaging the exam system.
Pinpointing specific areas such as spawning grounds would have a greater affect, without damaging fishermen's livelihoods.
